title: EOIR expands BIA to 21 judges
description_html:
EOIR adds four new Board Member positions to the BIA, raising the total from 17 to 21 judges. The BIA had recently expanded in 2015, raising the total then from 15 to 17.

[ID #211]
description_text:
EOIR adds four new Board Member positions to the BIA, raising the total from 17 to 21 judges. The BIA had recently expanded in 2015, raising the total then from 15 to 17.

[ID #211]
search_document: The then Board the four 21 raising BIA Mother Jones: The Trump Administration’s Court-Packing Scheme Fills Immigration Appeals Board With Hardliners EOIR expands BIA to 21 judges Executive Office for Immigration Review In an interim rule, EOIR added two more Board Member positions to the BIA, raising the total from 21 to 23 judges. Combined with the 2018 expansion, the two rules result in six appellate judge positions being created and appointed by the Trump administration. attachments.link_title: Expanding the Size of the Board of Immigration Appeals
attachments.description_html: On April 2, 2024, the DOJ published a final rule expanding the Board of Immigration Appeals by adding five Board member positions. Given the expansion of the Board to 23 members in 2021, this Biden administration policy thereby expands the Board to 28 members.

attachments.link_title: EOIR Interim Rule: Expanding the Size of the Board of Immigration Appeals
attachments.description_html: In an interim rule, EOIR added two more Board Member positions to the BIA, raising the total from 21 to 23 judges. Combined with the 2018 expansion, the two rules result in six appellate judge positions being created and appointed by the Trump administration.

attachments.link_title: Trump Admin To Nearly Halve Immigration Appeals Board
attachments.description_html: Law 360 reports that the Executive Office for Immigration Review (EOIR) has moved to shrink the size of the Board of Immigration Appeals (BIA) from 28 to 15 members.
